finding: `shouldQueueSharedSurface` required a `conflictMatrix.gateResults` block in addition to `needs-physical-split`. Physical file overlaps intentionally route to composer with matrix `allow`, so Broker reported a valid per-file conflict yet created no queue or holder notification.
expectedBehavior: Any `needs-physical-split` decision with concrete overlapping files must create per-file queue entries and an existing-protocol `FreezeSignal` sidecar; matrix `allow` for the composer route must not suppress queueing.
evidenceOrRepro: Live 0075 owner + AAO-0158 waiter transactions both returned `needs-physical-split`, while `broker status` still showed `sharedSurfaceQueues: []`.
followUp: Fix trigger condition and retain two-task dogfood with queue entries, freeze/ack evidence, and a governed release that advances the waiter.
